title: Generate JSON Data for a Restaurant Menu
scenario: Create a prompt that generates JSON data for a restaurant menu that includes dishes with prices, descriptions, and nutritional information. The JSON output should be under 1500 characters and include at least 10 dishes with their respective prices, descriptions, and nutritional information.
constraints: Use a consistent naming convention for dishes and nutritional information

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated JSON meets the character limit and uses a consistent naming convention.
Verify the accuracy and validity of the generated dish data, including prices, descriptions, and nutritional information.
Check if the generated JSON includes at least 10 dishes with their respective prices, descriptions, and nutritional information.
Evaluate the readability of the generated JSON, ensuring it is well-formatted and easy to understand.
